lore.english:
A student Taimanin, belonging to the UFS. Her father is European and a member of the UFS, and her mom is a Japanese Taimanin. She has awakened her Taimanin powers, but rather than going to Gosha Academy, she trains at UFS. 

Her personality is dominant, confident, and proud. Perhaps because of this, she is a bit of a nuisance to people around her, but she is actually a very hard worker, and those who know her trust her strongly.

Her ninja art, Magnet Art, allows her to control surrounding metals by generating magnetic fields. Because of this ability, she is unable to use her phone, radio, or other communication devices for missions, so to suppress her ability, she wears a suppressor on her head when not on a mission.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&ACC] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase ACC of All allies by 20% in Main Story
skills.description_readable: Increase ACC of All allies by 20% in Main Story

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Magnet Shower[-]
skills.description:
Attacks by dropping chunks of metal on the enemy's head.
Removes [&DmgBlockCount] from the target.
skills.description_readable:
Attacks by dropping chunks of metal on the enemy's head.
Removes Protective Shield from the target.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Magnet Art: Superconductive Field[-]
skills.description:
Grants [&Color_Cyan]([V3:670202]%)[-] [&Strengthen] to [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:670202] turn(s)
If the target already has [&Strengthen], the efficacy of [&Strengthen] increases by [&Color_Cyan][V3:670201]%[-].
skills.description_readable:
Grants (21%) Power-up to ALL allies.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
If the target already has Power-up, the efficacy of Power-up increases by 5%.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Magnet Art: Magnetic Wave[-]
skills.description: On [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnStart], reduces the turns of [&ElecShock] on allies by 1 turn.
skills.description_readable: On Turn Start, reduces the turns of Electrocute on allies by 1 turn.

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_6701]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_6703]
skill_data.description: On [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnStart], reduces the turn of [&Common_Word_Skill_SkillBlock] on allies by 1 turn.
skill_data.description_readable: On Turn Start, reduces the turn of Skill Disable on allies by 1 turn.
